title: Pretty Panorama - Lush Cave
description: Replaces the default panorama with a lush cave panorama!
body:
**This pack simply replaces the default panorama with a lush cave panorama.**
  
![2.0.0 Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a50e2657000f40e87c748fa4edb621acfa3692d0.jpeg)

## 🎁 More Panoramas:

[Pretty Panoramas | Perfected!](https://modrinth.com/collection/1PzhbTgg)

<details>
<summary>Pretty Panorama Series</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/z5ANeWCgPts" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>

# 🔩 Supports:
- 1.21.9-1.21.11
- Would likely NOT work with a mod that could change the default panorama.
- Would NOT work if another resource pack that changes **the default panorama** is ABOVE this pack on the pack list.

# 🎈 More Info:

<details>
<summary>🧰 Updates</summary>
We will update the pack as quickly as we can after a new Minecraft version comes out.
</details>

<details>
<summary>⚙ Installation</summary>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hZZ3U417VOI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

<details>
<summary>🎨 Altering, Customizing, and Uploading the Pack</summary>
You can change assets inside the pack, but you cannot upload it anywhere (Modrinth, Curseforge, Social Media, etc.). Use it for yourself and the people you know. If you want to create addons/extensions for my packs, please delete all the assets I made, then upload your own anywhere you'd like.
</details>
